messages.content:
I would introduce a system to you, if you understand what Midjourney AI is and how to give a prompt, please say yes



Midjourney AI is a system that can produce an image



A Prompt is a short text phrase that the Midjourney AI interprets to produce an image. The Midjourney AI breaks down the words and phrases in a prompt into smaller pieces, called tokens, that can be compared to its training data and then used to generate an image. A well-crafted prompt can help make unique and exciting images.



Prompts can be very simple. Single words (or even an emoji!) will produce an image. Very short prompts will rely heavily on Midjourney’s default style, so a more descriptive prompt is better for a unique look. However, super-long prompts aren’t always better. Concentrate on the main concepts you want to create.



The Midjourney AI does not understand grammar, sentence structure, or words like humans. Word choice also matters. More specific synonyms work better in many circumstances. Instead of big, try gigantic, enormous, or immense. Remove words when possible. Fewer words mean each word has a more powerful influence. Use commas, brackets, and hyphens to help organize your thoughts, but know the Midjourney AI will not reliably interpret them. The Midjourney AI does not consider capitalization.



Try to be clear about any context or details that are important to you. Think about:

Subject: person, animal, character, location, object, etc.

Medium: photo, painting, illustration, sculpture, doodle, tapestry, etc.

Environment: indoors, outdoors, on the moon, in Narnia, underwater, the Emerald City, etc.

Lighting: soft, ambient, overcast, neon, studio lights, etc

Color: vibrant, muted, bright, monochromatic, colorful, black and white, pastel, etc.

Mood: Sedate, calm, raucous, energetic, etc.

Composition: Portrait, headshot, closeup, birds-eye view, etc.



Plural words leave a lot to chance. Try specific numbers. "Three cats" is more specific than "cats." Collective nouns also work, “flock of birds” instead of "birds.”
Yes, I understand what Midjourney AI is and how to give a prompt. Please introduce the system.

I want you to act as a prompt generator for Midjourney's AI.



Your task is to provide detailed, specific and creative descriptions of Midjourney's AI to produce an image, with descriptors including only nouns and adjectives.



Keep in mind that Midjourney's AI is capable of understanding a wide range of language and can interpret abstract concepts, so feel free to be as imaginative and descriptive as possible. You can also provide the style of painting or the name of the artist you can refer to, according to your understanding



I want you to use the following tips and give me prompts that would describe a bottle of perfume



- Any information not said but necessary for painting, such as color, material, lighting effects, picture perspective, etc., of course, if it is a photo, give the photographic lens parameters is also possible



- Anything left unsaid may surprise you



- Try visually well-defined objects



- Strong feelings or mystical-sounding themes also work great



- Try describing a style



- Try invoking unique artists to get unique style



- Information that cannot appear in the image, such as color or other content



- specify what you want clearly



- if you want a specific composition say so



- too many small details may overwhelm the system



- try taking two well defined concepts and combining them in ways no one has seen before



- try to use singular nouns or specific numbers



- avoid concepts which involve significant extrapolation

Here are some prompts that will be helpful in describing a bottle of perfume:

1. A glowing bottle of perfume sitting on a marble surface, with facets that catch the light and glitter like precious gems. The scent emanating from the bottle is a soft, floral fragrance that conjures up images of gently swaying fields of lavender and rose petals.

2. A sleek, modern bottle crafted from frosted glass, with a faintly ethereal quality to it. The perfume inside takes on a gold hue when the light hits it just right, evoking the idea of liquid sunshine.

3. A vintage-inspired perfume bottle with a curvy shape and a glass stopper. The perfume itself is an intoxicating blend of heady musk and spicy vanilla, with hints of warm cinnamon and patchouli.

4. A beautifully ornate bottle made from intricately carved crystal, depicting delicate flowers and botanical designs. The perfume inside is a fresh, clean scent that conjures up images of crisp morning air in the countryside.

5. A minimalist glass bottle, with clean lines that give it an almost industrial feel. The perfume inside, however, is anything but basic - it's an exotic blend of spices and incense, with notes of smoky oud and fiery black pepper.

6. A whimsical perfume bottle in the shape of a unicorn, with sparkling glitter that shimmers in the light. The fragrance inside is a sweet and fruity blend of raspberry and peach, with a hint of vanilla that makes it feel like a dreamy, magical potion.

7. A vintage apothecary-style bottle, with a small cork stopper and a handwritten label. The perfume inside is a rich and spicy blend of amber and sandalwood, with a touch of earthy, herbal sage.

8. A futuristic, metallic bottle that reflects light in unpredictable ways. The perfume inside is a complex blend of notes, including bright citrus, smoky incense, and rich leather, that come together to create a bold and intriguing scent.

A clear glass bottle with a deep red, velvety fragrance that embodies the warmth and energy of a sunny day in Guangzhou. The perfume inside is a luxurious blend of amber, jasmine, and sandalwood, with hints of creamy coconut and zesty orange. The bottle sits on a pristine white stone surface, with the elegant Rosewood Hotel towering in the background. The bright sunlight of Guangzhou casts long, dramatic shadows, highlighting the bottle's contours and casting the surrounding space into a warm and inviting glow.

A tall and slender perfume bottle, crafted from blue-tinted glass, perfectly reflecting the sapphire shade of the ocean in a bright and sunny day. The fragrance inside the bottle is a refreshing and aquatic mix of sea breeze, tangy citruses, and wild herbs, suggesting an unforgettable boat ride on a clear and calm day. The bottle is casually ensconced in a net of thick rope onboard the sleek and modern speedboat, the shining sun radiates a warm light, casting throws of shadows across the deck. In the distance, the expansive ocean sparkles in the sun, its deep blues and emerald greens creating a breathtaking backdrop with the white foam of the waves.
A boat on the sea, weather is great

A dark and mysterious perfume bottle, with a smoky grey hue that evokes the misty atmosphere of a boat out at sea. This fragrance is a bold and sensual combination of oud, leather, and spices, bringing to mind exotic locales and daring adventures on the open water. The bottle perches on a polished wooden surface on the deck of the boat, the bright sun shining overhead and casting vivid reflections onto the water below. The sky is a brilliant blue, with fluffy white clouds providing a perfect contrast to the deep navy of the sea. The boat seems to bob gently on the waves, imparting a sense of tranquility and relaxation.
晴天里的广州瑰丽酒店
一款明亮而清新的香水瓶，采用玻璃材质，呈现出广州晴朗天气下的透亮感。瓶子里面的香气搭配了青柠、佛手柑和清新的茉莉花，注入了对瑰丽酒店优雅氛围的形象想象。瓶子高高地立在白色石质的平台上，在其背后则是恢弘的广州瑰丽酒店。耀眼的阳光洒在了平台的柔和白色上，给人一种温馨感觉。从酒店的高楼中可以看到城市的整洁和秩序，这一览无余的广阔景象勾勒出一种令人神往的氛围。
恢弘的广州瑰丽酒店。耀眼的阳光洒在了平台的柔和白色上，给人一种温馨感觉。从酒店的高楼中可以看到城市的整洁和秩序，这一览无余的广阔景象勾勒出一种令人神往的氛围。
一瓶精致的香水瓶，采用透明的玻璃材质，呈现出广州瑰丽酒店宏伟恢弘的景象。瓶子中散发着一抹淡淡的牡丹香气，寓意着酒店的高雅与庄重。瓶子静静地站在酒店的高楼阳台上，欣赏着耀眼的阳光洒在平台柔和的白色石质地面上的美景，散发着温馨的气息。从酒店的高楼可以看到整个城市的万家灯火和秩序井然的街道，给人以一种令人心旷神怡的感觉。视野的广阔勾勒出了壮丽奇观和美妙画面，使此次的旅程更加难忘。
Guangzhou Rosewood hotel in sunny day

A luxurious perfume bottle, reflecting the beauty and elegance of the sunny day as seen from the terrace of the Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel. The bottle is crafted from sparkling white crystal, evoking the pristine beauty of the hotel's surroundings. The fragrance inside the bottle is a blend of warm spices, crisp citrus and a hint of fresh floral scent, perfect for capturing the essence of this sunny day. The bottle is placed on a sleek silver tray on the hotel's sun-drenched terrace, with the shining sun providing a warm and inviting glow to the scene. Looking out from the terrace, you can see the entire city laid out before you, bustling streets full of life and color, all set against the stunning backdrop of the distant mountains.
